title: tabernaemontana flabelliformis
intro: Tabernaemontana flabelliformis, also known as the fan-leaved yellow tuberose, is a plant species in the Apocynaceae family, native to Southeast Asia. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its alkaloids, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Tabernaemontana flabelliformis include its antimalarial, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, pain, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as extracts and infusions, are used in traditional medicine to treat these conditions, although modern research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
